title: How do you code your calendar?
intro: We can't interpret your time without your system. Colors and labels mean different things for everyone.

questions.defaultForSofia: Social life — person's name or event

questions.prompt: Blueberry can mean more than one thing. What lives here?
Friend's name on yellow (Lua) or green (meals) when doing both?
How do you label DJ/social blocks?
Any labels that always mean TWO areas? (e.g. CAPRIXXO = RBL + DJing)
Do lavender blocks sometimes include errands or handoffs (e.g. someone picking something up for RBL)?
Which words in titles mean DJing/prep for you?
